title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.440 - Question to be submitted to voters
text:
95.440.  Question to be submitted to voters. — For the purpose of testing the sense of the voters upon a proposition to issue bonds for the purposes of taking up the indebtedness of such city or town as has been ascertained and determined by a judgment or decree of court, the council, trustees or other proper authority of such municipality shall order the question to be submitted to the voters.
(RSMo 1939 § 7462, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7309; 1919 § 8724; 1909 § 9603
